properties.Title: Weekly capabilities update: new media generation and system integrations

text.content: Manus provides comprehensive inventory of newly available capabilities including music/video generation via MiniMax, custom voice design, local machine integration, parallel processing up to 2000 tasks, and expanded MCP ecosystem. Key additions include media creation tools, yOS skills modularity, and direct desktop access while some features require OAuth completion.

markdown_content:
## Executive Summary

Manus provides comprehensive inventory of newly available capabilities including music/video generation via MiniMax, custom voice design, local machine integration, parallel processing up to 2000 tasks, and expanded MCP ecosystem. Key additions include media creation tools, yOS skills modularity, and direct desktop access while some features require OAuth completion.


## Context & Intent

User requested status update on new functionalities available this week compared to previous capabilities


## What Was Done

Systematic audit and documentation of current capabilities, distinguishing confirmed new features from existing ones, organized by category with technical specifications and limitations


## Outputs Produced

- [capability_inventory] New Features Matrix — Structured documentation of 8 major capability categories with technical details
- [technical_reference] MCP Status Report — Comprehensive list of active MCPs with functional status and auth requirements

## Key Decisions & Validations

- Focus on confirmed operational capabilities rather than theoretical features
- Distinguish between fully functional and OAuth-blocked services

## Lessons Learned

Worked well:

- Clear categorization of capabilities
- Technical specification detail
- Honest assessment of limitations
Failed / suboptimal:

- Some services blocked on OAuth authentication
- Need for user validation on certain integrations
Discoveries:

- Significant expansion in media generation capabilities
- 2000 parallel task processing now available
- Local machine integration fully operational

## Challenges & Blockers

- OAuth authentication required for heygen, instagram, hume services
- User authentication workflow needed for full capability access

## Open Questions

- When will OAuth authentication be completed for blocked services?
- What are the practical limits of the 2000 parallel task capability?

## Next Steps

- Complete OAuth setup for blocked MCPs
- Test parallel processing limits in practice
- Explore media generation workflows with new capabilities
